verses.latin_vulgate: In tempore autem illo consurget Michaël princeps magnus, qui stat pro filiis populi tui : et veniet tempus quale non fuit ab eo ex quo gentes esse cœperunt usque ad tempus illud. Et in tempore illo salvabitur populus tuus, omnis qui inventus fuerit scriptus in libro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָעֵ֣ת הַהִיא֩ יַעֲמֹ֨ד מִֽיכָאֵ֜ל הַשַּׂ֣ר הַגָּד֗וֹל הָעֹמֵד֮ עַל־בְּנֵ֣י עַמֶּ֒ךָ֒ וְהָיְתָה֙ עֵ֣ת צָרָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֤ר לֹֽא־נִהְיְתָה֙ מִֽהְי֣וֹת גּ֔וֹי עַ֖ד הָעֵ֣ת הַהִ֑יא וּבָעֵ֤ת הַהִיא֙ יִמָּלֵ֣ט עַמְּךָ֔ כׇּל־הַנִּמְצָ֖א כָּת֥וּב בַּסֵּֽפֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: But at that time shall Michael rise up, the great prince, who standeth for the children of thy people: and a time shall come, such as never was from the time that nations began, even until that time. And at that time shall thy people be saved, every one that shall be found written in the book.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin nousee suuri päämies Mikael, joka sinun kansas lasten edessä seisoo, sillä surkia aika on tuleva, jonka kaltaista ei ikänä ole ollut sittekuin ihmiset rupesivat olemaan, hamaan tähän aikaan asti. Sillä ajalla sinun kansas vapahdetaan. Kaikki, jotka kirjassa kirjoitetut ovat.
verses.king_james: And at that time shall Michael stand up, the great prince which standeth for the children of thy people: and there shall be a time of trouble, such as never was since there was a nation even to that same time: and at that time thy people shall be delivered, every one that shall be found written in the book.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et multi de his qui dormiunt in terræ pulvere evigilabunt, alii in vitam æternam, et alii in opprobrium ut videant semper.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרַבִּ֕ים מִיְּשֵׁנֵ֥י אַדְמַת־עָפָ֖ר יָקִ֑יצוּ אֵ֚לֶּה לְחַיֵּ֣י עוֹלָ֔ם וְאֵ֥לֶּה לַחֲרָפ֖וֹת לְדִרְא֥וֹן עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And many of those that sleep in the dust of the earth, shall awake: some unto life everlasting, and others unto reproach, to see it always.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja monta, jotka maan tomussa makaavat, heräävät, muutamat ijankaikkiseen elämään, ja muutamat ijankaikkiseen pilkkaan ja häpiään.
verses.king_james: And many of them that sleep in the dust of the earth shall awake, some to everlasting life, and some to shame and everlasting contempt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui autem docti fuerint, fulgebunt quasi splendor firmamenti : et qui ad justitiam erudiunt multos, quasi stellæ in perpetuas æternitates.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַ֨מַּשְׂכִּלִ֔ים יַזְהִ֖רוּ כְּזֹ֣הַר הָרָקִ֑יעַ וּמַצְדִּיקֵי֙ הָֽרַבִּ֔ים כַּכּוֹכָבִ֖ים לְעוֹלָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But they that are learned, shall shine as the brightness of the firmament: and they that instruct many to justice, as stars for all eternity.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta opettajat paistavat, niinkuin taivaan kirkkaus, ja jotka monta opettavat vanhurskauteen, niinkuin tähdet alati ja ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: And they that be wise shall shine as the brightness of the firmament; and they that turn many to righteousness as the stars for ever and ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu autem Daniel, claude sermones, et signa librum usque ad tempus statutum : plurimi pertransibunt, et multiplex erit scientia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֣ה דָֽנִיֵּ֗אל סְתֹ֧ם הַדְּבָרִ֛ים וַחֲתֹ֥ם הַסֵּ֖פֶר עַד־עֵ֣ת קֵ֑ץ יְשֹׁטְט֥וּ רַבִּ֖ים וְתִרְבֶּ֥ה הַדָּֽעַת׃
verses.douay_rheims: But thou, O Daniel, shut up the words, and seal the book, even to the time appointed: many shall pass over, and knowledge shall be manifold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinä Daniel, peitä nämät sanat ja sulje kirjaan hamaan viimeiseen aikaan asti. Siloin pitää sen tykö monta tuleman ja suuren ymmärryksen löytämän.
verses.king_james: But thou, O Daniel, shut up the words, and seal the book, even to the time of the end: many shall run to and fro, and knowledge shall be increased.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vidi ego Daniel, et ecce quasi duo alii stabant : unus hinc super ripam fluminis, et alius inde ex altera ripa fluminis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָאִ֙יתִי֙ אֲנִ֣י דָנִיֵּ֔אל וְהִנֵּ֛ה שְׁנַ֥יִם אֲחֵרִ֖ים עֹמְדִ֑ים אֶחָ֥ד הֵ֙נָּה֙ לִשְׂפַ֣ת הַיְאֹ֔ר וְאֶחָ֥ד הֵ֖נָּה לִשְׂפַ֥ת הַיְאֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I, Daniel, looked, and behold as it were two others stood: one on this side upon the bank of the river, and another on that side, on the other bank of the river.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä Daniel näin ja katso, kaksi muuta seisoi siellä, toinen tällä virran reunalla ja toinen toisella virran reunalla.
verses.king_james: Then I Daniel looked, and, behold, there stood other two, the one on this side of the bank of the river, and the other on that side of the bank of the river.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixi viro qui erat indutus lineis, qui stabat super aquas fluminis : Usquequo finis horum mirabilium ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֗אמֶר לָאִישׁ֙ לְב֣וּשׁ הַבַּדִּ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר מִמַּ֖עַל לְמֵימֵ֣י הַיְאֹ֑ר עַד־מָתַ֖י קֵ֥ץ הַפְּלָאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I said to the man that was clothed in linen, that stood upon the waters of the river: How long shall it be to the end of these wonders?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän sanoi sille miehelle, joka oli liinaisilla vaatteilla puetettu, joka seisoi ylempänä virtaa: Koska näiden ihmetten loppu tulee?
verses.king_james: And one said to the man clothed in linen, which was upon the waters of the river, How long shall it be to the end of these wonders?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et audivi virum qui indutus erat lineis, qui stabat super aquas fluminis, cum elevasset dexteram et sinistram suam in cælum, et jurasset per viventem in æternum, quia in tempus, et tempora, et dimidium temporis. Et cum completa fuerit dispersio manus populi sancti, complebuntur universa hæc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶשְׁמַ֞ע אֶת־הָאִ֣ישׁ ׀ לְב֣וּשׁ הַבַּדִּ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר מִמַּ֘עַל֮ לְמֵימֵ֣י הַיְאֹר֒ וַיָּ֨רֶם יְמִינ֤וֹ וּשְׂמֹאלוֹ֙ אֶל־הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם וַיִּשָּׁבַ֖ע בְּחֵ֣י הָעוֹלָ֑ם כִּי֩ לְמוֹעֵ֨ד מֽוֹעֲדִ֜ים וָחֵ֗צִי וּכְכַלּ֛וֹת נַפֵּ֥ץ יַד־עַם־קֹ֖דֶשׁ תִּכְלֶ֥ינָה כׇל־אֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I heard the man that was clothed in linen, that stood upon the waters of the river, when he had lifted up his right hand, and his left hand to heaven, and had sworn by him that liveth for ever, that it should be unto a time, and times, and half a time. And when the scattering of the band of the holy people shall be accomplished, all these things shall be finished.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä otin hänestä vaarin, joka liinaisilla vaatteilla puetettu oli, joka seisoi ylempänä virtaa. Ja hän nosti oikian ja vasemman kätensä taivaasen päin ja vannoi sen kautta, joka ijankaikkisesti elää, että sen pitää ajan, ja muutamat ajat ja puolen aikaa viipymän. Ja kuin pyhän kansan hajoitus saa lopun, silloin kaikki nämät tapahtuvat.
verses.king_james: And I heard the man clothed in linen, which was upon the waters of the river, when he held up his right hand and his left hand unto heaven, and sware by him that liveth for ever that it shall be for a time, times, and an half; and when he shall have accomplished to scatter the power of the holy people, all these things shall be finished.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ego audivi, et non intellexi. Et dixi : Domine mi, quid erit post hæc ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֥י שָׁמַ֖עְתִּי וְלֹ֣א אָבִ֑ין וָאֹ֣מְרָ֔ה אֲדֹנִ֕י מָ֥ה אַחֲרִ֖ית אֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I heard, and understood not. And I said: O my lord, what shall be after these things?
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä tosin kuulin tämän, vaan en minä ymmärtänyt. Ja minä sanoin: Herra, mitä näiden lopulla tapahtunee?
verses.king_james: And I heard, but I understood not: then said I, O my Lord, what shall be the end of these things?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait : Vade, Daniel, quia clausi sunt signatique sermones usque ad præfinitum tempus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֖אמֶר לֵ֣ךְ דָּנִיֵּ֑אל כִּֽי־סְתֻמִ֧ים וַחֲתֻמִ֛ים הַדְּבָרִ֖ים עַד־עֵ֥ת קֵֽץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said: Go, Daniel, because the words are shut up, and sealed until the appointed time.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hän sanoi: Mene Daniel, sillä se on peitetty ja suljettu hamaan viimeiseen aikaan.
verses.king_james: And he said, Go thy way, Daniel: for the words are closed up and sealed till the time of the end.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eligentur, et dealbabuntur, et quasi ignis probabuntur multi : et impie agent impii, neque intelligent omnes impii : porro docti intelligent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִ֠תְבָּֽרְר֠וּ וְיִֽתְלַבְּנ֤וּ וְיִצָּֽרְפוּ֙ רַבִּ֔ים וְהִרְשִׁ֣יעוּ רְשָׁעִ֔ים וְלֹ֥א יָבִ֖ינוּ כׇּל־רְשָׁעִ֑ים וְהַמַּשְׂכִּלִ֖ים יָבִֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Many shall be chosen, and made white, and shall be tried as fire: and the wicked shall deal wickedly, and none of the wicked shall understand, but the learned shall understand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Monta puhdistetaan, kirkastetaan ja koetellaan, mutta jumalattomat pitävät jumalattoman menon ja jumalattomat ei näitä tottele, mutta ymmärtäväiset ottavat näistä vaarin.
verses.king_james: Many shall be purified, and made white, and tried; but the wicked shall do wickedly: and none of the wicked shall understand; but the wise shall understand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et a tempore cum ablatum fuerit juge sacrificium, et posita fuerit abominatio in desolationem, dies mille ducenti nonaginta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמֵעֵת֙ הוּסַ֣ר הַתָּמִ֔יד וְלָתֵ֖ת שִׁקּ֣וּץ שֹׁמֵ֑ם יָמִ֕ים אֶ֖לֶף מָאתַ֥יִם וְתִשְׁעִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And from the time when the continual sacrifice shall be taken away, and the abomination unto desolation shall be set up, there shall be a thousand two hundred ninety days.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siitä ajasta, kuin se jokapäiväinen uhri on otettu pois ja hävityksen kauhistus sinne pannaan, on tuhannen kaksisataa ja yhdeksänkymmentä päivää.
verses.king_james: And from the time that the daily sacrifice shall be taken away, and the abomination that maketh desolate set up, there shall be a thousand two hundred and ninety days.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beatus qui exspectat, et pervenit usque ad dies mille trecentos triginta quinque.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַשְׁרֵ֥י הַֽמְחַכֶּ֖ה וְיַגִּ֑יעַ לְיָמִ֕ים אֶ֕לֶף שְׁלֹ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת שְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים וַחֲמִשָּֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed is he that waiteth, and cometh unto a thousand three hundred thirty-five days.
verses.finnish_biblia: Autuas on, joka odottaa ja ulottuu tuhanteen kolmeensataan ja viiteen päivään neljättäkymmentä.
verses.king_james: Blessed is he that waiteth, and cometh to the thousand three hundred and five and thirty days.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu autem vade ad præfinitum : et requiesces, et stabis in sorte tua in finem dierum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֖ה לֵ֣ךְ לַקֵּ֑ץ וְתָנ֛וּחַ וְתַעֲמֹ֥ד לְגֹרָלְךָ֖ לְקֵ֥ץ הַיָּמִֽין׃
verses.douay_rheims: But go thou thy ways until the time appointed: and thou shalt rest, and stand in thy lot unto the end of the days.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sinä mene pois, siihen asti kuin loppu tulee ja lepää, ettäs nousisit sinun osaas päiväin lopulla.
verses.king_james: But go thou thy way till the end be: for thou shalt rest, and stand in thy lot at the end of the days.
